entries.name: BBC News
entries.description: Top stories and breaking news from the BBC, covering world events, UK news, politics, and business.

entries.name: NPR News
entries.description: National and world news headlines from National Public Radio, with reporting on politics, society, and culture.

entries.name: The Guardian — World
entries.description: International news and analysis from The Guardian, covering global affairs, conflict, and human rights.

entries.name: Al Jazeera
entries.description: Global news from Al Jazeera with a focus on the Middle East, Africa, and the Global South.

entries.name: The New York Times — Home
entries.description: Front-page stories from The New York Times spanning US and world news, politics, and opinion.

entries.name: Ars Technica
entries.description: In-depth technology news and analysis covering computing, science, policy, gadgets, and gaming.

entries.name: The Verge
entries.description: Technology, science, art, and culture news with reviews of consumer gadgets and coverage of the tech industry.

entries.name: WIRED
entries.description: Reporting on how emerging technology shapes culture, the economy, science, and politics.

entries.name: TechCrunch
entries.description: Startup and technology industry news, funding rounds, venture capital, and product launches.

entries.name: MIT Technology Review
entries.description: Analysis of emerging technologies — AI, biotech, climate, and computing — and their impact on society.

entries.name: Hacker News — Front Page
entries.description: Front-page links from Hacker News: programming, startups, technology, and computer science discussion.

entries.name: Lobsters
entries.description: Computing-focused community link aggregator covering programming, security, and software engineering.

entries.name: The GitHub Blog
entries.description: Product updates, engineering posts, and developer news from GitHub.

entries.name: Stack Overflow Blog
entries.description: Essays and interviews on software development, developer culture, and engineering practice.

entries.name: Martin Fowler
entries.description: Writing on software design, architecture, refactoring, and agile development practices.

entries.name: Real Python
entries.description: Tutorials and articles for learning Python programming, from basics to advanced techniques.

entries.name: Python Insider
entries.description: Official news from the Python core development team, including release announcements.

entries.name: Rust Blog
entries.description: Official announcements from the Rust programming language team, including releases and roadmap updates.

entries.name: This Week in Rust
entries.description: Weekly roundup of news, blog posts, crates, and community updates from the Rust ecosystem.

entries.name: The Go Blog
entries.description: Official blog of the Go programming language with release notes, design articles, and tutorials.

entries.name: CSS-Tricks
entries.description: Front-end web development articles on CSS, JavaScript, HTML, and modern browser techniques.

entries.name: Smashing Magazine
entries.description: Articles on web design, front-end development, UX, accessibility, and performance.

entries.name: arXiv cs.AI
entries.description: Latest preprints in Artificial Intelligence from arXiv: reasoning, planning, knowledge representation, and agents.

entries.name: arXiv cs.LG
entries.description: Latest preprints in Machine Learning from arXiv: deep learning, neural networks, optimization, and learning theory.

entries.name: arXiv cs.CL
entries.description: Latest preprints in Computation and Language from arXiv: natural language processing, large language models, and linguistics.

entries.name: arXiv stat.ML
entries.description: Latest preprints in Machine Learning (Statistics) from arXiv: statistical learning, probabilistic models, and inference.

entries.name: Hugging Face Blog
entries.description: Posts on open-source machine learning, transformers, large language models, and the ML community.

entries.name: Berkeley AI Research (BAIR) Blog
entries.description: Research highlights from Berkeley AI Research on machine learning, robotics, computer vision, and reinforcement learning.

entries.name: The Gradient
entries.description: Essays and perspectives on artificial intelligence research, its history, and its societal implications.

entries.name: Nature
entries.description: Research and news from Nature across the physical, life, and earth sciences.

entries.name: Science Magazine — News
entries.description: News from the journal Science covering breakthroughs and policy across all scientific disciplines.

entries.name: Quanta Magazine
entries.description: In-depth journalism on developments in mathematics, physics, biology, and computer science.

entries.name: Scientific American
entries.description: Science news and explanatory journalism across health, technology, environment, and physics.

entries.name: Phys.org
entries.description: Daily science and technology research news across physics, space, chemistry, and biology.

entries.name: NASA
entries.description: News and updates from NASA on space exploration, missions, astronomy, and earth science.

entries.name: Krebs on Security
entries.description: Investigative reporting on cybercrime, data breaches, and computer security by Brian Krebs.

entries.name: Schneier on Security
entries.description: Commentary on security, cryptography, privacy, and technology policy by Bruce Schneier.

entries.name: The Hacker News
entries.description: Cybersecurity news on vulnerabilities, malware, breaches, and threat intelligence.

entries.name: U.S. Federal Reserve — All Press Releases
entries.description: Official press releases from the U.S. Federal Reserve, including monetary policy and banking regulation.

entries.name: U.S. Federal Reserve — Monetary Policy
entries.description: Federal Reserve press releases specific to monetary policy, including FOMC statements and interest-rate decisions.

entries.name: Bank of England — News
entries.description: News and announcements from the Bank of England on monetary policy, financial stability, and banknotes.

entries.name: The Economist — Finance & Economics
entries.description: Analysis of global finance and economics from The Economist, covering markets, policy, and trade.

entries.name: Marginal Revolution
entries.description: Daily economics commentary and links from Tyler Cowen and Alex Tabarrok on markets, policy, and culture.

entries.name: Engadget
entries.description: Consumer technology news and reviews covering gadgets, gaming, mobile, and entertainment.

entries.name: OpenAI Blog
entries.description: Announcements and research updates from OpenAI on large language models, safety, and products.

entries.name: Google Research Blog
entries.description: Research from Google across machine learning, systems, algorithms, health, and quantum computing.

entries.name: Google DeepMind Blog
entries.description: Research and announcements from Google DeepMind on artificial intelligence, reinforcement learning, and science.

entries.name: Nature Machine Intelligence
entries.description: Peer-reviewed research on machine learning, AI, and robotics published in Nature Machine Intelligence.

entries.name: ESPN — Top Headlines
entries.description: Top sports headlines from ESPN covering football, basketball, baseball, soccer, and more.

entries.name: Variety
entries.description: Entertainment industry news covering film, television, music, and the business of Hollywood.
